data.title: RED test: validate-gate-signal.py behavioral tests
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py with pytest tests that call plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py as a subprocess, pipe JSON input via stdin, and assert on exit codes and stdout content.

Test cases:
1. test_valid_complete_signal — valid JSON with all fields → exit 0, stdout contains confirmation
2. test_missing_gate_id — JSON missing gate_id → non-zero exit
3. test_missing_triggered — JSON missing triggered field → non-zero exit
4. test_invalid_signal_type — signal_type not in [primary, modifier] → non-zero exit
5. test_wrong_triggered_type — triggered is string instead of bool → non-zero exit
6. test_empty_json_object — empty {} → non-zero exit
7. test_malformed_json — non-JSON string → non-zero exit
8. test_valid_stdout_content — valid signal → stdout is non-empty and contains structured output

Test approach: each test function spawns validate-gate-signal.py via subprocess.run(), pipes JSON on stdin, asserts on returncode and stdout. Tests are behavioral — they execute the script and assert on observable exit codes and output content.

Tests fail RED because validate-gate-signal.py does not exist yet.

Add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py: tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] Tests are behavioral (use subprocess to execute the script)
  Verify: grep -q 'subprocess' tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py
- [ ] .test-index entry exists mapping source to test
  Verify: grep -q 'validate-gate-signal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Running tests returns non-zero (RED) pre-implementation
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
